samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: Saute onion and garlic in butter until soft
Add ginger and cook until it becomes soft
Add tomato sauce, garam masala, cumin, chili powder
add salt and taste. > cook on medium heat for 15 minutes
add the cream and cook for another few minutes
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- cilantro

Instructions:
1. Saute onion and garlic in butter until soft
2. Add ginger and cook until it becomes soft
3. Add tomato sauce, garam masala, cumin, chili powder
4. add the chicken and water
5. add salt and taste. > cook on medium heat for 15 minutes
6. add the cream and cook for another few minutes

samples.title: Butter Chicken
steps: In a large pot, saute onion, garlic and ginger in the butter until slightly browned
Stir in tomato sauce and chicken
Add garam masala, cumin, chili, cream, salt and pepper
samples.formatted:
Butter Chicken

Ingredients:
- chicken breast
- butter
- onion
- garlic
- ginger
- tomato sauce
- garam masala
- cumin
- chili powder
- heavy cream
- salt
- cilantro

Instructions:
1. In a large pot, saute onion, garlic and ginger in the butter until slightly browned
2. Stir in tomato sauce and chicken
3. Add garam masala, cumin, chili, cream, salt and pepper
4. simmer 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally

Add tomato sauce, garam masala, cumin, chilli powder and salt, stir to combine
